summary: Verified NEW drag-and-drop UI positioning feature in Display Layout preview. All 8 draggable HUD elements (navigationHUD, speedOverlay, maneuverPreview, weatherPanel, tripPanel, mapControls, arrivalHUD, routeComparison) have proper data-testid attributes and gold move indicators in edit mode. Edit Layout toggle works correctly (Lock/Unlock states). Dragging elements repositions them within the preview. Positions persist to localStorage under 'nav_hud_positions' key. Reset Pos button resets positions to defaults. Reset All button resets visibility, order, AND positions. Show All/Hide All updates preview in real-time. Existing drag-and-drop list reordering still works (18 drag handles found).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: DraggablePreviewItem component uses native pointer events for dragging (not @dnd-kit)
VERIFIED: Edit mode toggle with data-testid='preview-edit-toggle-btn' shows Lock/Unlock icons
VERIFIED: Gold border glow (border-[#D4AF37]) appears on preview in edit mode
VERIFIED: Gold move indicators (bg-[#D4AF37] with Move icon) appear on all 8 draggable elements
VERIFIED: Reset Pos button (data-testid='preview-reset-positions-btn') only visible in edit mode
VERIFIED: Positions saved to localStorage under 'nav_hud_positions' key
VERIFIED: DEFAULT_POSITIONS defined in utils/hudLayout.ts with correct default coordinates
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx listens for 'hud-positions-changed' event to apply positions
VERIFIED: Reset All button resets positions along with visibility and order

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag-and-drop UI positioning feature fully verified. Key data-testids: preview-edit-toggle-btn (edit mode toggle), preview-reset-positions-btn (reset positions), preview-drag-{id} for 8 draggable elements. Positions stored in localStorage under 'nav_hud_positions' key. The preview uses native pointer events for dragging, while the list reordering below uses @dnd-kit library.

display_layout_tab_loads.details: Display Layout tab loads with Live Preview showing all visible HUD elements

edit_layout_toggle.details: Edit Layout button toggles between locked (Edit Layout) and unlocked (Editing) states with Lock/Unlock icons

gold_border_glow_in_edit_mode.details: Gold border glow (border-[#D4AF37]) appears around preview when in edit mode

gold_move_indicators.details: Gold move indicators appear on all 8 draggable elements: navigationHUD, speedOverlay, maneuverPreview, weatherPanel, tripPanel, mapControls, arrivalHUD, routeComparison

drag_repositioning.details: Dragging elements in edit mode repositions them within the preview (tested speedOverlay: moved from x=783 to x=863)

reset_pos_button.details: Reset Pos button only appears in edit mode and resets element positions to defaults

position_persistence_localstorage.details: Position changes persist to localStorage under 'nav_hud_positions' key

visibility_toggle_real_time.details: Show All/Hide All updates preview in real-time (0/18 visible when hidden, 18/18 when shown)

existing_list_reordering.details: Existing drag-and-drop list reordering in categories still works (18 drag handles found with data-testid='hud-drag-{key}')

reset_all_resets_positions.details: Reset All button resets visibility, order, AND positions (navigationHUD y position reset from 9.07 to 3)

localStorage_keys_verified.nav_hud_positions: Stores element positions as {id: {x: number, y: number}}
localStorage_keys_verified.nav_hud_layout: Stores visibility settings for each HUD element
localStorage_keys_verified.nav_hud_order: Stores element order within each category
